title: Guernsey, Alderney and Sark: Knowledge Base profile
body: "This document contains useful information about Guernsey, Alderney and Sark which will assist His Majesty’s Passport Office staff process passport applications.  This document includes information about:   names nationality legitimacy and parental responsibility adoption surrogacy gender recognition civil partnerships and marriage documents from Guernsey, Alderney and Sark  "
